Executive Summary

Key Takeaways

  • Herald Square (66.8), Times Square (65.3), and Penn Station (65.0) lead the portfolio, all benefiting from Midtown's dense transit access, tourism draw, and anchor ecosystem. The Macy's Flower Show (running through April 5) is the single highest-scoring near-term event across this cluster — scoring 10.0 at Herald Square (0.18 km), 8.9 at Times Square, and 9.6 at Penn Station. The Easter Parade & Bonnet Festival (April 5) adds a second major demand spike across all three Midtown stores on the same weekend.
  • Raising Cane's (0.02 mi from Penn Station) is the highest-scoring individual competitive threat in the portfolio, with an active grand-opening promotion offering a free Box Combo to the first 200 customers. Shake Shack (0.01 mi from Downtown Brooklyn), Popeyes, and McDonald's are the next highest-threat competitors by proximity and promotional intensity. Chipotle is the most widely distributed competitor, appearing in promo datasets for Flatiron and multiple Midtown stores.
  • Rock Center (64.6) and Flatiron (63.7) complete the Midtown cluster. Rock Center's 6th Ave corridor benefits from the New York International Auto Show (through April 19) and Korea Festival as the two strongest upcoming events. Flatiron benefits from NoMad Piazza and Broadway Flea Market foot traffic through April and May.
  • Financial District (59.8) and Upper East Side (57.4) show Net Opportunity scores above their Overall Strength (60.8 and 60.4 respectively) — the widest strength-to-opportunity gaps in the portfolio. Both are priority targets for loyalty activation and event-timed promotions, with the Financial District's lunch-driven office population and the UES's high-density residential base representing underserved demand.
  • Weather outlook is bifurcated across the 15-day window. March 31 through April 6 is broadly favorable — warm temperatures above seasonal norms drive positive WIS readings across most stores. April 7–11 turns sharply negative before recovering from April 12. Sunday trading (April 5 and April 12) is excluded from weather impact tracking per Chick-fil-A's operating model.
  • Downtown Brooklyn (52.2) is the strongest outer-borough location, with Barclays Center events running through April. Shake Shack at 0.01 mi is the most proximate competitive threat. Harlem (46.8) and Upper West Side (47.3) serve dense residential corridors; both benefit from Sakura Matsuri Cherry Blossom Festival (late April) as their highest-impact upcoming event.

Easter Parade & Bonnet Festival
2026-04-05 • 0.6 mi from store • Score: 9.6 • Est. 35,000–75,000 attendees
The Easter Parade & Bonnet Festival is expected to draw a very high turnout of approximately 35,000 to 75,000 attendees within a venue capacity of about 100,000, creating significant demand due to its high local relevance, major crowd draw, weekend timing, and close proximity to the store.
Upcoming Events
Macy's Flower Show HIGH · 8.9
2026-03-22 to 2026-04-05 • Macy's Herald Square (near Flatiron) • 0.5 mi from store • Cap: 50,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Macy's Flower Show is expected to draw a very high turnout of approximately 17,500 to 37,500 attendees, which is a significant portion of the venue's 50,000 capacity. Its high local relevance, weekend timing, and close proximity to the Chick-fil-A store suggest strong demand and increased customer visits, though actual turnout may vary below the venue's maximum capacity.

Active Promotions Detail
McDonald's • 0.40 mi5.7 · High
2026-03-29
McDonald's: Free 10-piece McNuggets with first app purchase expiring March 31, 2026
This promotion offers a strong discount on McNuggets for first-time app users, making it very attractive to customers. Because it’s easy to redeem through the app and available anytime, it encourages new visitors to try the store. Plus, since your location is close to customers, they’re more likely to take advantage of this deal, helping boost your sales.
Shake Shack • 0.47 mi5.4 · High
2026-03-01
Shake Shack: Free ShackBurger with Purchase Promotion, Valid 30 Days
This promotion offers a strong deal—a free ShackBurger with purchase—making it very attractive to customers. It’s easy for them to redeem through kiosks or the app without any extra spending requirements, which encourages more people to take advantage. Since it’s available for a limited time and close to your store, you can expect a good boost in visits and sales during the promotion period.
Raising Cane's Chicken Fingers • 0.10 mi4.9 · Medium
2026-03-01
Raising Cane's Chicken Fingers: Ongoing 'Free CANE'S® for a Year' Sweepstakes Promotion
This promotion offers a chance to win free meals for a whole year, which is exciting and easy to enter since customers just need to complete a quick survey. Because the prize is valuable and the entry process is simple, it can attract attention, but since the featured items don’t closely match what customers usually buy, it might not drive a big boost in immediate sales. Still, having the promotion nearby and running all month helps keep customers interested and coming back.
KFC • 0.30 mi4.7 · Medium
2026-03-29
KFC: Donate $1 in-store to receive $30 worth of coupons valid through April 30, 2026
This promotion offers customers a great deal—over $30 in coupons for just a $1 purchase—which makes it very attractive. Because the coupons must be bought and used in-store, customers nearby are more likely to take advantage, especially since the offer comes back regularly. However, since the coupons only apply to certain menu items and can’t be combined with other deals, some customers might hesitate. Overall, the promotion draws in local shoppers looking for good savings bu.
Raising Cane's Chicken Fingers • 0.10 mi4.4 · Medium
2026-03-30
Raising Cane's Chicken Fingers: Recurring Weekly 'Lucky 20' Promotion Next Occurrence March 30, 2026
This “Lucky 20” drawing is a fun way to bring people into your store since winners get a free Raising Cane’s combo with no purchase needed. Because it happens weekly and is easy to enter while customers are nearby, it helps keep regular visitors coming back. However, since the prize is random and only a few win each time, the overall boost in sales is moderate. Keep encouraging customers to join in and enjoy the event to make the most of its appeal.
Wingstop • 0.30 mi4.4 · Medium
2026-03-25
Wingstop: $0 Delivery Fee Wednesdays for NYC delivery orders through 2026-04-01
This promo offers free delivery every Wednesday, making it easy and attractive for customers who usually pay a delivery fee. Because it happens weekly and is simple to use, customers are more likely to order on those days. However, since the promo mainly appeals to delivery orders close to the store, its overall impact is moderate. Encouraging customers to take advantage of this can help boost midweek sales.
Shake Shack • 0.47 mi4.4 · Medium
2026-03-29
Shake Shack: Free Chicken Shack with $10 Minimum Purchase via Mobile App
This promotion offers a strong discount but requires customers to spend at least $10, which might slow some shoppers down. Since the deal is available all month and easy to redeem through the app, many customers nearby are likely to notice and use it. However, because the promoted item isn’t an exact match to what customers usually buy, the overall boost in sales might be modest. Keep encouraging app use and highlight the convenience to get the best results.
Jollibee • 0.66 mi3.2 · Medium
2026-03-29
Jollibee: New member $5 off $10 spend offer valid 14 days from enrollment
This promo offers new members $5 off when they spend $10 or more, which is a nice deal but only applies once within two weeks of signing up. Because customers need to join the rewards program and redeem the offer through the app or website, it might slow some people down. Also, the deal is for specific menu items that don’t closely match popular combos, so it may not attract everyone. However, since your store is nearby, local customers are more likely to notice and use it.

However, because it’s limited to Uber One student members and requires app login, some shoppers might find it a bit tricky to redeem. The offer repeats weekly on specific dates, helping customers remember it, and since the store is close by, nearby shoppers are more likely to take advantage. Easter Parade & Bonnet Festival
2026-04-05 • 0.2 mi from store • Score: 9.2 • Est. 35,000–75,000 attendees
The Easter Parade & Bonnet Festival is expected to draw a very high turnout of approximately 35,000 to 75,000 attendees near the Chick-fil-A store, with the venue capacity around 100,000 serving as an upper bound. Given the event's high local relevance and weekend timing, demand is likely to surge significantly, though actual turnout may vary below venue capacity.

Active Promotions Detail
Bonchon • 0.38 mi4.5 · Medium
2026-03-30
Bonchon: Ongoing free shipping on orders above $35
This free shipping offer encourages customers to spend at least $35 online to get their order delivered at no extra cost. Because the items in the promo don’t closely match popular menu choices, it may not strongly motivate fans of specific dishes to buy more. Still, since the deal is ongoing, easy to trust, and your store is nearby, it can gently nudge shoppers to add a few extra items to reach the free shipping threshold.
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.23 mi3.9 · Medium
2026-03-20
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen: Buy 1 Get 1 Poppin' Deals for Iced Spanish Latte and Signature Pies valid Mar 20 to Apr 6
This Buy One Get One free deal is easy for customers to use since they just need to buy one item to get the second free, which encourages quick decisions. Because it’s a limited-time offer and close to your store, it can attract nearby shoppers looking for a good deal. However, since the promoted item isn’t a direct meal substitute and the discount isn’t very strong, expect a moderate boost in sales rather than a big spike.
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.23 mi3.0 · Medium
2026-03-30
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen: 2 Sandwiches + Regular Side for $12 ongoing deal
This promotion has a modest impact on sales because the discount isn’t very strong and the featured items don’t closely match what customers usually buy together. However, it’s easy for customers to redeem through the app, and since the offer is ongoing and available anytime, it keeps customers coming back regularly. Plus, because your store is very close to customers, that proximity helps boost how well the promo works. Overall, it’s a steady but not dramatic driver of custo.
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.23 mi2.9 · Low
2026-04-01
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen: Weekly recurring sandwich deal Thursday March 2 upcoming
This 3-for-$5 Signature Chicken deal is easy for customers to use and comes around regularly, which helps keep interest steady. However, because the discount isn’t very strong compared to the regular price and the deal doesn’t closely match other popular menu items, it’s not driving a big boost in sales. Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.23 mi2.9 · Low

Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen: 3 for $5 Deal ongoing promotion

Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.23 mi2.7 · Low

Because it’s available all day and nearby, it’s convenient but the specific items in the deal don’t closely match what customers usually buy, so it’s not driving a lot of extra sales. Subway • 0.10 mi2.6 · Low
2026-03-30

Since the free item is different from what customers usually buy, it may not attract many repeat buyers. However, because the store is very close to where customers are, it has a better chance of drawing them in despite the extra steps. Overall, expect only a small boost in sales from this promotion.

KFC • 1.85 mi2.4 · Low
2026-03-31

Because it happens every week, loyal customers might plan their visits around it, but the limited availability keeps overall impact modest.

2026-03-30

This promotion offers a moderate discount on a footlong sandwich, but since it’s a different sandwich type than usual and requires customers to use an app and enter a code, it’s a bit harder for them to redeem. Because the deal comes back occasionally and your store is very close to customers, you’ll see some interest, but overall the impact on sales will be fairly low. Subway • 0.10 mi2.1 · Low
2026-03-30

2026-03-30

2026-03-29
McDonald's: Free 10-piece McNuggets with first $1+ purchase via app
This promotion offers a strong discount on McNuggets but requires customers to make a small purchase through the app, which adds a bit of extra effort. Because it’s a one-time offer for new app users and is easy to redeem nearby, it can attract new customers who are close by and willing to try the app. However, since the product match isn’t perfect and the deal isn’t recurring, expect a moderate boost in sales rather than a big surge.

2026-03-29

This promotion offers a free Chicken Shack sandwich with a $10 purchase, which is a strong deal that can attract customers. However, because customers need to spend at least $10 and use a promo code through the app or kiosk, some may find it a bit tricky to redeem. Since the offer is limited-time and your store is close to customers, you can expect a moderate boost in visits and sales if you remind shoppers about the easy way to claim their free sandwich.

Ninth Avenue International Food Festival
2026-05-16 to 2026-05-17 • 0.9 mi from store • Score: 7.9 • Est. 35,000–75,000 attendees
The Ninth Avenue International Food Festival is expected to draw a major crowd with an estimated attendance between 6,000 and 35,000 people, which is significant but below the venue's upper capacity of about 100,000. Given the event's medium local relevance and proximity within about one mile, a high demand impact is likely as many attendees may visit the nearby Chick-fil-A during the weekend event.
Upcoming Events
Sakura Matsuri (Cherry Blossom Festival) MEDIUM · 7.4
2026-04-25 to 2026-04-26 • Brooklyn Botanic Garden (impacts nearby Manhattan stores via transit) • 0.9 mi from store • Cap: 60,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Sakura Matsuri at Brooklyn Botanic Garden has a high impact on nearby Manhattan Chick-fil-A stores because it is a major crowd draw with an expected turnout between 3,600 and 21,000 people, well within the venue's 60,000 capacity, and the event's weekend timing and close proximity make it likely that a significant portion of attendees will visit the store.

2026-05-23 to 2026-05-25 • Around Washington Square Park • 0.9 mi from store • Est. 17,500–37,500 attendees
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Washington Square Outdoor Art Exhibit is expected to draw a major crowd with an estimated attendance between 3,000 and 17,500 people, which is significant but below the venue's 50,000 capacity. Its close proximity to the Chick-fil-A location and weekend timing increase the likelihood of high demand from event attendees visiting the store.

2026-05-01 to 2026-05-04 • The Shed at Hudson Yards • 0.9 mi from store • Cap: 30,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The event is expected to draw a major crowd with an attendance range of approximately 1,800 to 10,500 people, which is significant relative to the venue's capacity of about 30,000. Despite low local relevance, the close proximity within about one mile supports a high impact on demand, though actual turnout may be much lower than full capacity.

Japan Parade LOW · 6.1
2026-05-09 • Central Park West / 68th St → Central Park West / 81st St (AMNH) • 1.0 mi from store • Est. 10,500–22,500 attendees

2026-03-05 to 2026-05-25 • The Metropolitan Museum of Art • 0.5 mi from store • Cap: 10,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Metropolitan Museum of Art's new spring exhibition is expected to draw a moderate crowd of approximately 600 to 3,500 attendees near the Chick-fil-A store, which is within walking distance. Although the venue can hold about 10,000 people, actual turnout is likely much lower, resulting in a moderate increase in demand due to some attendees potentially visiting the nearby restaurant.

★ TOP EVENT
Ninth Avenue International Food Festival
2026-05-16 to 2026-05-17 • 0.8 mi from store • Score: 7.9 • Est. 35,000–75,000 attendees
The Ninth Avenue International Food Festival is expected to draw a major crowd with an estimated attendance between 6,000 and 35,000 people, which is significant but below the venue's upper capacity of about 100,000. Given the event's medium local relevance, weekend timing, and close proximity to the store, demand at the Chick-fil-A nearby is likely to be high due to increased foot traffic from attendees.
Upcoming Events
Sakura Matsuri (Cherry Blossom Festival) MEDIUM · 7.4
2026-04-25 to 2026-04-26 • Brooklyn Botanic Garden (impacts nearby Manhattan stores via transit) • 0.8 mi from store • Cap: 60,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Sakura Matsuri at Brooklyn Botanic Garden has a high impact on nearby Manhattan Chick-fil-A stores because the event is a major crowd draw with an expected attendance between 3,600 and 21,000 people, well below the venue's 60,000 capacity but still substantial. Its weekend timing and close proximity (less than a mile) increase the likelihood that a significant portion of attendees will visit nearby stores, driving higher demand.
Washington Square Outdoor Art Exhibit (Spring) MEDIUM · 7.4
2026-05-23 to 2026-05-25 • Around Washington Square Park • 0.8 mi from store • Est. 17,500–37,500 attendees
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The event is expected to draw a major crowd with an estimated attendance between 3,000 and 17,500 people, which is significant though below the venue's 50,000 capacity. Its weekend timing and close proximity to the store increase the likelihood of medium local demand, resulting in a high impact on nearby visits.
Frieze New York LOW · 6.4
2026-05-01 to 2026-05-04 • The Shed at Hudson Yards • 0.8 mi from store • Cap: 30,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The event at The Shed at Hudson Yards has a high impact on demand because it is a major crowd draw with an expected attendance between 1,800 and 10,500 people, which is significant though below the venue's 30,000 capacity. Its close proximity to the Chick-fil-A location within less than a mile increases the likelihood of attendees visiting the store despite the event's low local relevance.
Park Avenue Day LOW · 6.1
2026-05-16 • Park Avenue (Murray Hill), Manhattan • 0.8 mi from store • Cap: 50,000
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The event is expected to draw a major crowd of approximately 3,000 to 17,500 people within a venue capacity of about 50,000, and its weekend timing plus close proximity to the store suggest a high potential for increased demand despite some uncertainty in turnout.
Japan Parade LOW · 6.1
2026-05-09 • Central Park West / 68th St → Central Park West / 81st St (AMNH) • 1.0 mi from store • Est. 10,500–22,500 attendees
● BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
The Japan Parade is expected to draw a high impact on demand due to its major crowd draw status and weekend timing, attracting approximately 1,800 to 10,500 attendees within close proximity to the store, though the venue capacity of about 30,000 sets an upper bound and actual turnout may be much lower.

Active Promotions Detail
Wendy's • 0.60 mi5.1 · High
2026-04-07
Wendy's: Free Dunk for America promotion starts post-NCAA Championship
This promotion gives customers a free small fries and Frosty combo with no purchase needed, making it easy and appealing to redeem. However, since it’s only available late at night on one specific day and the featured items don’t closely match what customers usually buy, the overall boost in sales will be moderate. Being close to the store helps attract nearby customers, but the limited timing means you won’t see a big rush.
McDonald's • 0.60 mi4.4 · Medium
2026-04-03
McDonald's: Recurring App-Exclusive Free Medium Fries on Fridays
This promo offers free medium fries with just a $1 purchase every Friday, which is a strong deal that customers will notice. However, since it’s only available through the app and requires a small spend, some customers might find it a bit tricky to redeem. Also, because the fries don’t perfectly match the main items customers usually buy, the promo might not drive as many extra sales as hoped. Overall, expect moderate interest, especially from regular app users nearby.
Chirp • 3.29 mi4.1 · Medium
2026-03-31
Chirp: 80% Off All Audiobooks Coupon Code Ending Soon
This promotion offers a strong discount that’s easy for customers to use online, which helps encourage purchases. However, the deal is only somewhat related to the main items customers usually buy here, so it might not attract as many shoppers as more closely matched offers. Since it’s a one-time offer with no special time limits, it’s good to promote it clearly so customers don’t miss out. Overall, it can boost sales but may need extra attention to connect with your regular.
Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen • 0.60 mi3.9 · Medium
2026-03-20
Popeyes: BOGO Poppin' Deals on Iced Spanish Latte and Signature Pies Mar 20 - Apr 6
This Buy One Get One free offer is easy for customers to use and is happening for a limited time only, which encourages quick visits. Since the deal is on a popular item that complements other products but isn’t a full meal substitute, it draws in foot traffic without replacing bigger purchases. The promotion’s nearby location and trusted source help attract local shoppers, but overall, the impact is moderate—expect some extra visits but not a big sales spike.
KFC • 1.81 mi3.8 · Medium
2026-03-30
KFC: Donate $1 for $30 Worth of Coupons Valid Through April 30, 2026
This promotion offers a big discount, which usually attracts customers, but it’s a bit tricky because they have to buy a $1 coupon book in-store and can only use it at certain locations. Also, the items on the coupon don’t match very closely with what customers usually buy together, so it may not feel very relevant. Since this deal comes around regularly and runs during normal hours, some customers will take advantage, but overall, it’s likely to have a modest impact on sales.
Jollibee • 3.32 mi3.7 · Medium
2026-03-31
Jollibee: Manhattan E 42nd St & 5th Ave Grand Opening Free Giveaway Event
This promotion offers a free chicken sandwich to the first 100 customers each day during the grand opening, which attracts good interest but only for a short time. Because the giveaway is limited and only lasts three days, not everyone will get one, so some customers might miss out or not come back immediately. Still, the free offer and trusted Facebook source help bring in new visitors and create excitement around your store.
Krispy Krunchy Chicken • 2.55 mi3.1 · Medium
2026-03-30
Krispy Krunchy Chicken: 55% off first purchase promo expiring March 31, 2026
This promotion offers a clear 55% discount on a first purchase, making it very easy for customers to use without extra steps. However, because the deal applies to a slightly different product than what customers usually buy, it may not catch their attention as much. Since it’s a one-time offer and comes from a trusted brand website, it can still encourage some new shoppers to try the product, but overall, its impact on sales is expected to be modest.
Koko Wings • 0.82 mi3.0 · Medium
2026-03-30
Koko Wings: Up to 70% Off Coupon Promotion Ongoing
This promotion offers a decent discount and is easy for customers to use since it only requires entering a coupon code. Because it’s ongoing and nearby, customers are more likely to notice and take advantage of it regularly. However, the deal is for a slightly different product than usual, so it might not attract everyone. Overall, expect a modest boost in customer visits and sales.
KFC • 1.81 mi3.0 · Medium
2026-03-30
KFC: Free Bucket Combo in App for $9.75 Ends Today (March 30, 2026)
This promotion offers a big discount on a bucket combo, making it a good deal that customers will notice. However, since the deal must be redeemed through the app and is only available for a short time today, some customers might find it a bit tricky to use or miss it altogether. Also, the combo items don’t closely match what some customers usually buy, so it may not appeal to everyone. Overall, expect moderate interest—encourage customers to act quickly and use the app to ge.
Charles Pan-Fried Chicken • 1.48 mi2.8 · Low
2026-03-30
Charles Pan-Fried Chicken: Ongoing free sugarcane-infused honey cornbread giveaway
This free giveaway of sugarcane-infused honey cornbread is easy for customers to redeem since it requires no purchase and happens regularly on Sundays. However, because it doesn’t closely match popular menu items and comes from a less familiar source, it’s likely to attract only a modest number of customers. Still, its convenient location nearby helps encourage some local interest.
Chicken Insider • 1.66 mi2.8 · Low
2026-03-30
Chicken Insider: $10 off $20+ delivery order one-day promotion
This promotion offers a decent discount but requires customers to spend at least $20 and use a promo code for delivery, which might slow down how many people take advantage of it. Also, the deal is only for one day and was shared on Instagram, so it may not reach everyone in your area. Because the items in the promo don’t closely match popular menu choices, fewer customers might be motivated to buy. Overall, expect a modest boost in sales, mostly from customers who are alread.
Krispy Krunchy Chicken • 2.55 mi2.8 · Low
2026-03-30
Krispy Krunchy Chicken: $4 Value Meal weekdays 10 AM-2 PM pickup only expires March 31, 2026
This promotion offers a strong discount on a popular meal combo, which usually attracts customers looking for value. However, since it’s only available on weekdays during limited hours and requires pickup, some shoppers might find it less convenient to redeem. Because it repeats regularly and comes from a trusted brand website, loyal customers are likely to plan visits around it. Overall, expect steady but moderate customer interest during the promo times.
Krispy Krunchy Chicken • 2.55 mi2.7 · Low
2026-03-30
Krispy Krunchy Chicken: Six pieces chicken $4.99 coupon expiring March 31, 2026
This promotion offers a good deal on six pieces of chicken at a low price, making it easy for customers to understand and use. However, because the coupon is a one-time offer and the product is a bit different from what customers usually buy, it may not attract a lot of repeat buyers. Still, since it’s straightforward and comes from a trusted source, it should bring in some new customers looking for a simple, affordable option.
Krispy Krunchy Chicken • 2.55 mi2.4 · Low
2026-03-30
Krispy Krunchy Chicken: MIX GRILL $12.99 coupon offer expires March 31, 2026
This MIX GRILL coupon offers a good discount, making it attractive to customers. It’s easy for shoppers to use both online and in-store, which helps encourage redemption. However, since the coupon is for a limited time and the item isn’t a close match to some popular menu choices, you might see only a modest boost in sales from this promo. Keep promoting it clearly so customers know about the deal before it expires.
Boongs Korean Fried Chicken • 2.50 mi2.4 · Low
2026-03-30
Boongs Korean Fried Chicken: $1 Wings Deal on Mondays and Tuesdays
This $1 Wings deal is easy for customers to use and comes around every week on Mondays and Tuesdays, which helps build regular visits. However, because the discount isn’t very strong compared to the usual price and the wings offered don’t closely match popular menu items, it’s not driving a lot of extra sales. To get more impact, consider making the deal more appealing or tying it to items customers already love.

⚙
Methodology
1
Store Intelligence Engine
Agent: Store Intelligence Agent • Coverage: 9 Nike stores across NYC boroughs
Computes 12 aggregate scores and 5 composite indices per store using POI density, transit data, competitor mapping, demographic fit, and event amplification signals.
12 Aggregate Scores5 Composite IndicesTrade Area Profiling
2
Competitive Landscape Engine
Agent: Competitive Intelligence Agent • Coverage: Direct & indirect competitors per store
Maps and scores all sportswear, apparel, and footwear competitors within the 0.5 mi trade area.
Competition Pressure IndexDirect Competitor Threat
3
Event Intelligence Engine
Agent: Event Intelligence Agent • Coverage: 1,283 events tracked across 9 stores
AI Agents discover and score events using a 4-component model: brand alignment, scale, proximity decay, and context bonus. Scores are calibrated for artist popularity and sports matchup significance. Capacity suppressed for open-air events. Events before March 24, 2026 excluded.
1,283 Events TrackedArtist Popularity CalibrationProximity Decay Applied
4
Promo Discovery Engine
Agent: Web Intelligence Agent • Coverage: 613 promos across 9 stores
AI Agents autonomously discover and extract active promotions across competitor brands. Revenue deflection risk is computed per brand per store using EDP, W-SKU overlap, ease of redemption, recurrence, and distance decay.
613 Promos9 StoresRevenue Deflection RankedSource URLs Traced
5
Weather & Seasonal Impact Modelling
Horizon: 16-day rolling forecast • Signals: Temperature • Precipitation • Wind Speed
Each alert is scored against historical baselines with hourly anomalies layered on top. Impact direction and magnitude interpreted factoring in store hours and weekday/weekend weighting. Days with zero impact score are suppressed.
Historical BaselineHourly AnomaliesWeekday / Weekend WeightingZero-Impact Days Suppressed
ⓘ
Score Definitions
13 Dimension Scores
Competition Pressure
Overall density of competing businesses in the surrounding trade area. A higher score reflects a more saturated competitive environment, which also signals strong category demand in the location.
Direct Competitor Threat
Concentration of direct, like-for-like competitors operating nearby. A higher score indicates greater head-to-head competitive exposure within the immediate trade area.
Athletic Ecosystem
Presence of gyms, fitness studios, and sporting goods retailers in the area. Reflects a health- and activity-oriented consumer base that generates consistent, routine-driven foot traffic.
Retail Culture Density
Density of apparel, specialty, and lifestyle retail in the trade area. A strong score indicates a shopping-oriented neighbourhood with high discretionary trip frequency throughout the day.
Event Amplification
Volume and relevance of nearby events. Captures the degree to which local events — festivals, concerts, sports, community gatherings — create incremental foot traffic opportunities for businesses in the area.
Transit Connectivity
Accessibility of public transit stops within half a mile, including subway, bus, and ferry. Strong scores reflect locations with broad catchment reach and sustained pedestrian throughput driven by commuter and visitor flows.
Tourism
Presence of hotels, landmarks, and tourist attractions in the trade area. Higher scores indicate locations that draw visitor spend alongside resident demand, broadening the potential customer base.
Place Density
Total volume of points of interest within the trade area, serving as a broad proxy for urban density and neighbourhood activity. The strongest single indicator of how commercially active a location is day-to-day.
Dining Density
Concentration of food and beverage establishments in the trade area. A high score signals a strong eating-out culture and robust foot traffic during meal periods.
Nightlife Culture
Presence of bars, entertainment venues, and late-night businesses nearby. Reflects the area's potential for extended-hour demand and evening foot traffic beyond standard retail and dining hours.
Anchor Ecosystem
Proximity to major retail anchors such as department stores, malls, and flagship destinations. Anchors generate durable, multi-purpose visitor traffic that benefits nearby businesses throughout the day.
Demographic Fit
How well the surrounding population profile aligns with the brand's target customer. Based on census-level indicators including income, density, and education.
Walkability
Quality of pedestrian infrastructure around the location, derived from street-level walk networks. Higher scores indicate lower friction for spontaneous visits and stronger conversion from passing foot traffic.
13 dimension scores are aggregated into the 5 composite indices shown opposite.
5 Composite Indices
Overall Store Strength
The headline measure of a location's trade area quality across all positive dimensions, adjusted for competitive pressure. Used to rank and compare locations within a portfolio.
Net Opportunity
The estimated upside available at a location after accounting for competitive gaps and local demand dynamics. A location can score lower on overall strength but higher on net opportunity where demand is underserved relative to competition.
Trade Area Vibrancy
A measure of how active and commercially energised the surrounding area is, combining dining, nightlife, retail culture, events, and tourism signals. High vibrancy indicates an area that generates its own foot traffic independent of a single destination.
Accessibility Score
How easily customers can reach and discover the location, driven by transit access, walkability, and surrounding place density. Stronger scores are associated with higher visit frequency and broader catchment draw.
Event Revenue Potential
The degree to which nearby events, amplified by tourism exposure and trade area vibrancy, create incremental revenue opportunities. Identifies locations best positioned to benefit from event-driven traffic spikes and targeted activations.

Chick-fil-A NYC Retail Intelligence Report • Powered by Propheus Retail Agent • March 2026
